scope.target: Minimal conditional micro-system/mono-system logical repository grammar
constraints: Define only one logical grammar and workload mapping
workload means bounded context for micro-system and system for mono-system
Do not make physical layout universal
Do not expand into naming-detail or cross-profile migration design
non_goals: Review or modify dotnet-webapi-lab product code

steps: Define the shared logical solution-folder grammar
Document the workload mapping for micro-system and mono-system profiles
Record the minimal observability boundary as deferred design input only
validation: One deterministic check or review item per equivalence criterion
execution.last_completed_step: DEC-003 was approved only for the minimal logical grammar; DEC-004 was removed from this remediation scope.
execution.next_action: Start after RULE-001; create a separate design workflow if full Observability work is later authorized.

results.residual_risk: Only the minimal rule that runtime AOP observability is CrossCutting and Domain must not depend on it may be retained as a bounded candidate; full design is outside this workflow.
